title: Atomic write pattern for checkpoint files — write temp, fsync, rename
problem: Current checkpoint writes (task-queue-add.py, task-queue-complete.py) write directly to target file. If agent dies mid-write, checkpoint becomes partial/corrupted JSON. Next agent cannot resume, task stalls.
solution: Implement atomic write pattern: (1) write to temp file, (2) fsync to disk, (3) atomic rename to target. Either complete file exists or old file remains — no partial writes.

atoms.title: Create atomic_write() helper in Python lib
atoms.description: Write atomic_write(filepath, content) function in scripts/lib/atomic-write.py. Steps: open temp file in same directory, write content, flush, fsync, close, os.rename(temp, target).
acceptanceCriteria: Function takes (target_path, json_content) and returns bool success
Uses tempfile in same directory as target (guarantees atomic rename on same filesystem)
Calls os.fsync() before rename
Handles exceptions gracefully (cleanup temp file on failure)
Unit test: simulate crash mid-write, verify old file intact

atoms.title: Replace direct writes in task-queue-add.py
atoms.description: Replace json.dump() direct write with atomic_write() call in task-queue-add.py checkpoint creation.
acceptanceCriteria: task-queue-add.py uses atomic_write() for checkpoint creation
Verify by adding test task and checking checkpoint integrity
No regression in task creation flow

atoms.title: Replace direct writes in task-queue-complete.py
atoms.description: Replace json.dump() direct write with atomic_write() call in task-queue-complete.py checkpoint updates.
acceptanceCriteria: task-queue-complete.py uses atomic_write() for checkpoint updates
Verify by completing atom and checking checkpoint integrity
No regression in atom completion flow

atoms.title: Replace direct writes in task-queue-fail.py
atoms.description: Replace json.dump() direct write with atomic_write() call in task-queue-fail.py checkpoint updates.
acceptanceCriteria: task-queue-fail.py uses atomic_write() for checkpoint updates
Verify by failing atom and checking checkpoint integrity

atoms.title: Replace direct writes in all other state-modifying scripts
atoms.description: Audit all scripts that write JSON state files. Replace direct writes with atomic_write() where data integrity matters.
acceptanceCriteria: Scripts audited: task-queue-*.py, state-snapshot.sh, any other JSON writers
Direct writes replaced in all critical state files
List of files updated documented in CHG

atoms.title: Unit test: simulate crash and verify integrity
atoms.description: Create test that simulates crash during checkpoint write. Verify old checkpoint remains intact.
acceptanceCriteria: Test writes large JSON to checkpoint file
Test interrupts write mid-stream (kill -9 simulation)
Verify old checkpoint file is intact (not truncated)
Verify temp file is cleaned up (no orphaned .tmp files)

risks.mitigation: Write temp file in same directory as target

risks.risk: Disk full during write — temp file created but rename fails
risks.mitigation: Check disk space before write, cleanup temp on exception

risks.risk: Permission denied on temp file in restricted directory
risks.mitigation: Use same permissions as target file, handle OSError

acceptanceCriteria: All checkpoint file writes use atomic pattern
Crash simulation test passes (old file intact)
No orphaned temp files after success or failure
Performance impact <10ms per write
Documented in CHG with file list
